title: Broad coverage: current Polar.DB vs SQLite
description: Broad integration experiment for current Polar.DB vs SQLite. It combines reverse bulk load, build/stabilization, reopen/refresh, direct lookup, random lookup batch, append cycles, reopen after each cycle, and artifact growth tracking. It is intentionally not a Polar.DB NuGet version matrix.

dataset.notes: Synthetic persons(id,name,age) dataset for controlled storage-engine measurement.

workload.notes: Broad scenario: reverse bulk load, build/stabilize, reopen/refresh, direct lookup, random lookup, append cycles, reopen after each cycle, lookup sampling, artifact growth tracking.

fault.notes: No fault injection in this executable catalog experiment.

fairness.notes: Targets should use equivalent durable persisted semantics.

runs.notes: Heavy broad-coverage profile. CLI may override.
